elements.name: Create one loan and foreclose it with valid details

steps.name: User is logged in for foreclosure testing
User creates loan for foreclosure using "TC_FORE_001"
User forecloses created loan using "TC_FORE_001"
Foreclosure response for "TC_FORE_001" should be validated
User logs into the banking application

elements.name: Create three loans verify max limit foreclose one loan and create another

steps.name: User is logged in for foreclosure testing
User creates three active loans for max limit
User tries to create fourth loan using "TC_FORE_002_PERSONAL"
Maximum loan limit message should be displayed for "TC_FORE_002_PERSONAL"
User forecloses any one active loan using "TC_FORE_002_PERSONAL"
User creates another loan after foreclosure using "TC_FORE_002_PERSONAL"
New loan should be created successfully after foreclosure
User logs into the banking application

elements.name: Try to foreclose loan with insufficient balance account

steps.name: User is logged in for foreclosure testing
User creates loan for foreclosure using "TC_FORE_003"
User forecloses created loan using "TC_FORE_003"
Foreclosure response for "TC_FORE_003" should be validated
